chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI Suit No. 52 of 2019 -------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge -------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For hearing of CMA No. 3043/2019. 2. For hearing of CMA No. 348/2019. 3. For examination of parties/settlement of issues. ------------------ 25.02.2021 Mr. Mansoor-ul-Afrin, Advocate for the plaintiff. Mr. Umar Hayat Sandho, Advocate for defendant No.1. Mr. Arshad M. Tayebaly, Advocate for defendant No.2. ------------------ Learned counsel for defendant No. 1 files an application under Order VIII, rule 10 read with Section 151 C.P.C, seeking recalling of order of Additional Registrar (O.S) dated 3rd March, 2020, whereby the said defendant was debarred from filing written statement and allow it to file written statement. The application is taken on record; copy whereof is supplied to learned counsel for the plaintiff and defendant No. 2, who records their no objection for the grant of this application. Accordingly, this application is allowed. Consequently, defendant No. 1 is allowed to file written statement within three days hereof. Application stands disposed of. Office is directed to assign C.M.A. number to this application. The matter is adjourned to a date in office. Interim order passed earlier shall continue till the next date of hearing. JUDGE Athar Zai
